title: Postgres server with a container-host connection string is SAFE

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/postgres/README.md). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: A read-oriented postgres server pointed at a container-host database, with no inline credentials and no shell, presents no flagged surface to a reviewer.
knownLimitations: A connection string with embedded credentials would be a different case; this one has none.
